REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO: (1) COMPEL ARBITRATION OF INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS, (2) DISMISS CLASS CLAIMS, AND (3) STAY PROCEEDINGS HELD ON APR-14-2025 AT 10:00AM IN DEPT 304. TENTATIVE RULING PREVIOUSLY CIRCULATED TENTATIVELY GRANTING THE MOTION. THE COURT AND COUNSEL CONFER AND FURTHER ORAL ARGUMENTS HEARD. THE COURT HEREBY ORDERS FOR SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFINGS TO (1) THE POTENTIAL APPLICABILITY OF THE FINRA SIMPLIFIED ARBITRATION RULES; AND (2) ANY OTHER ISSUE RAISED AT THE HEARING THAT EITHER PARTY BELIEVES WAS NOT ADEQUATELY COVERED IN THE BRIEFING. BRIEFINGS TO BE FILED NO LATER THAN APRIL 23, 2025 PER ORDER OF THE COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; REPORTER KATHRYN LLOYD CSR #5955, TEL. NO. (925) 548-9114, EMAIL: KATHIL58@GMAIL.COM; CLERK ED SANTOS; DEPT 304.

REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDARED ON APR-14-2025 AT 10:00AM IN DEPT 304.
